data.body:
# Session arc — 2026-06-26/27

A long session that started from one churn bug and expanded into removal-sync
provenance, plan-review telemetry, full type/lint CI gating, and coverage hygiene.
All work via the gate cycle (review-plan -> claim -> implement -> code-review
subagent -> suite -> close via completion verifier -> PR with auto-merge).

## 1. Parent-detach churn (drum-ruler-suit) — PR #54 (superseded by #56)
/joe-debug root-caused: the Jira reconciler's parent sync was ASYMMETRIC — a local
detach (parent_id -> None) was never pushed to Jira (outbound_differ only emitted a
parent field when truthy), so the inbound differ re-applied the stale epic-link every
~3-min reconcile pass. Fix: emit a symmetric parent CLEAR + applier set_parent(None) +
same-pass inbound suppression. Held-out RED->GREEN test, mutation-checked.

## 2. Audit for sibling antipatterns -> two more bugs
Found the SAME asymmetric-clear pattern elsewhere:
- wake-inn-parse (link/dep removal churn): both _diff_links (outbound) and
  _diff_links_inbound were ADD-only -> a local unlink reverted every pass.
- tan-elbow-mica: the parent CLEAR from #54 was un-gated -> would clobber a
  human-set-in-Jira parent on a locally-parentless ticket.

## 3. Managed-reference provenance (safe-luge-nog) — PR #56 (MERGED)
Researched how peers handle bidirectional-sync deletions (Unito/Exalate additive-only;
ghas-jira-integration's state-store; CRDT tombstones; FolderSync/Syncthing 'observed
before delete'). Chose: build ONE reusable, provider-agnostic primitive.
- Reducer maintains compiled_state.managed_refs: a strictly-monotonic union of every
  (kind, target) ref a ticket ever managed (parent + link relations). Lives in
  compiled_state so process_snapshot restores it -> SURVIVES compact_ticket (the
  durability hole a raw-event projection like local_label_intent fails closed across).
  Migration-seeds old snapshots from current parent_id + deps. TypeGuard _is_kind.
- Shared should_propagate_removal gate; fail-open (missing managed_refs -> no delete).
- Consumed by BOTH parent (tan-elbow-mica) + link (wake-inn-parse) removal.
- docs/managed-refs.md documents the pattern for future peers (Linear/GitHub Issues).
- Completion verifier rejected the close twice for genuinely-missing tests (a chained
  compact->unlink->reconcile proof + a two-pass operator-facing churn proof) — both
  added. drum-ruler-suit superseded by #56 (cohesive PR incl. the parent fix).

## 4. Plan-review latency/cost telemetry (toy-kink-ire) — PR #58 (MERGED)
B-RETIRE removed bespoke run_review, the only producer of coverage['metrics']. Reinstated
on the WORKFLOW path: the interpreter now records per-step duration_ms (leaf + batch),
and gate_dispatch._attach_plan_review_metrics reconstructs det_ms/llm_ms/total_ms/
llm_calls/claim_path from recorder step timings. Sidecar already lifts metrics. Offline
e2e test via a single branching FakeRunner.

## 5. Full mypy + ruff CI gating (urge-abbey-goal) — PR #59 (MERGED)
Triggered by #56's CI catching a mypy error the local hook missed (hook ran ruff only).
- Drove mypy src/rebar 158 -> 0 (4 parallel per-package subagents; type-only, code-
  reviewed for ZERO behavior change; 4 justified type:ignore[valid-type] for runtime-
  built pydantic models).
- Tightened BLE001: removed the tests/** blanket ignore; 20 blind-excepts -> 9 narrowed
  + 11 inline-justified. Kept intentional T201 CLI-print ignores (researched: we're
  strict-but-idiomatic, hatch/pydantic camp; 21/25 peer CLIs don't even enable T201).
- make typecheck now covers full src/rebar; CI mypy step gating; both advisory ratchet
  steps removed; added a typecheck pre-commit hook.
- Rebasing onto the meanwhile-merged #57 surfaced 2 mypy errors in #57's code (written
  while the gate was advisory) — fixed (the retroactive catch the gate exists for).

## 6. Coverage hygiene — PR #60 (auto-merge)
docs/coverage.md baseline was stale (61% / 1758 tests, 2026-06-14). Clean measurement:
77% in-process / 3540 tests. Raised fail_under 50 -> 70 (7-pt headroom); refreshed the
doc; documented the modern subprocess recipe under 'Future'.

## 7. Subprocess coverage -> P4 epic (tot-bongo-mudra)
Researched: modern recipe is ~3 lines ([tool.coverage.run] patch=['subprocess'] +
coverage combine); rebar is the easy same-env case (no path remap). NOT universal (pdm/
hatch/pipx/pre-commit accept the undercount). Real gotcha for us: CLI exit-code tests
that os._exit/SIGTERM don't flush -> need patch=['subprocess','_exit'] / sigterm=true.
Filed as P4 epic tot-bongo-mudra for later.

## Process notes / gotchas hit
- Worktree isolation per major piece; each needs its OWN venv (editable install points
  at the worktree src). Commit before running the full suite — the test-isolation guard
  can revert uncommitted changes; concurrent pytest runs across agents pollute a shared
  worktree.
- The typecheck pre-commit hook needs mypy on PATH (venv active) — bare `mypy` like the
  existing bare `ruff`. Documented in docs/local-dev-env.md (dev-only).
- #59 squash-merged mid-work -> its branch auto-deleted; a stray push recreated it. Put
  the coverage change on a clean branch (#60) instead and deleted the stray.
- Completion verifier (REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=1) can exceed the 5-min foreground limit on
  large diffs — run the close in the background.

## Merged/open
#54 (closed, superseded) | #56, #58, #59 MERGED | #60 auto-merge.
Tickets closed signed: drum-ruler-suit, wake-inn-parse, tan-elbow-mica, safe-luge-nog,
toy-kink-ire, urge-abbey-goal. Backlog: tot-bongo-mudra (P4 subprocess coverage).
